message:
feat(core): add quantile_sketch.rs — t-digest streaming percentile estimation (ft-283h4.20)

Implements t-digest algorithm for O(1) amortized insertion and O(log n)
approximate quantile queries. Supports merge, CDF, weighted inserts, and
configurable compression. 31 proptest properties verify monotonicity,
bounds, merge semantics, and serde roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
